title: Headset connection status change reflected on the Cloud
scenario: Verify headset connection status (green/red mark) is correctly reflected across Device Users, Inventory, Mobile Profile, and Device Profile pages when headset is turned on/off.
steps: 2. Navigate to the Device Users/Mobile User page and check the headset connection status.
3. Navigate to the Inventory page and check the headset connection status.
4. Navigate to the Mobile Profile page and check the headset connection status.
5. Navigate to the Device Profile page and check the headset connection status.
7. Navigate to the Device Users/Mobile User page and check the headset connection status.
8. Navigate to the Inventory page and check the headset connection status.
9. Navigate to the Mobile Profile page and check the headset connection status.
10. Navigate to the Device Profile page and check the headset connection status.
expected: When the headset is turned on, the status should show a green mark across all pages (Device Users/Mobile User, Inventory, Mobile Profile, Device Profile). When the headset is turned off, the status should show a red mark across all pages.
